summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Hotmart Super Agent Module 2 (Product Matching). All 15 backend API tests passed. Frontend Productos Hotmart tab, product matching flow, credentials warning, ProductCard components, and toast notifications all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper separation between scraper, LLM fallback, and affiliate API

All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing (product-card-{id}, product-title-{id}, generate-link-{id}, copy-link-{id}, view-product-{id}, credentials-warning, matching-progress, no-products-state, products-grid, start-matching-btn, tab-products, tab-trends)
MongoDB _id is correctly excluded from all API responses
Graceful handling of missing Hotmart credentials - returns credentials_missing status
LLM fallback (Claude Sonnet 4.5) works correctly when scraping fails (Cloudflare blocks)
Synthetic products (ai_, det_, hm_ prefixes) correctly return synthetic_product status for affiliate link requests
test_credentials: No authentication required for this module. Hotmart credentials intentionally empty in backend/.env
seed_data_creation: Product matching was executed for AR (8 products) and CL (5 products) during testing. PE trends were deleted and restored during 409 test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Module 2 is fully functional. All endpoints tested: GET /api/hotmart/status (credentials_configured:false), POST /api/products/match (starts execution), GET /api/products/executions/{id} (tracks status), GET /api/products/{country_code} (returns scored products), GET /api/products/{country_code}/{hotmart_id}/affiliate-link (synthetic_product for AI products), DELETE /api/products/{country_code}. Frontend tested: Productos Hotmart tab, credentials warning banner, ProductCard grid, Buscar productos button with progress indicator, Generar link toast for synthetic products.

tests: Dashboard loads with all 5 country cards
Country detail panel opens on card click
Credentials warning banner visible when credentials_configured:false
ProductCard shows title, category, commission %, rating, score, matched_pain_points chips
Ver en Hotmart link present with correct href
Generar link button triggers API call and shows toast for synthetic products
Buscar productos button triggers matching with progress indicator

module2_specific_validations.product_matching: Scraper attempts Hotmart marketplace, falls back to LLM (Claude Sonnet 4.5) when blocked by Cloudflare
module2_specific_validations.affiliate_link_generation: Synthetic products (ai_, det_, hm_ prefixes) return synthetic_product status
module2_specific_validations.credentials_handling: Graceful handling - products and scoring work without credentials, only hotlink generation requires them
